hooks.command: bash skills/audit-log.sh 'investigation_request' 'AWS investigation initiated' && bash skills/security-check.sh 'aws-investigator' 2>&1 | tail -20
bash skills/audit-log.sh 'investigation_request' 'EKS investigation initiated' && bash skills/security-check.sh 'eks-investigator' 2>&1 | tail -20
bash skills/audit-log.sh 'investigation_request' 'Datadog investigation initiated' && bash skills/security-check.sh 'datadog-investigator' 2>&1 | tail -20
bash skills/security-check.sh 'AWS or K8s command detected' 2>&1 | grep -E 'SENSITIVE|PRODUCTION' || true
